# Etra: Names & Cultures — jasskadian culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === JASSKADIAN CULTURES ===

REPLACE:highlander_salusian_culture = {
	language = highlander_salusian_dialect
	color = map_highland
	tags = { scottish_highland_gfx gaelic_gfx scottish_gfx celtic_gfx north_british_gfx british_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		human_group
		jaskadian_group
	}
}

	language = ashenborn_dialect
	color = rgb { 15 15 15 }
	tags = { irish_gfx gaelic_gfx celtic_gfx baltic_gfx eastern_european_gfx european_gfx }

}
